selected_plan.title: Add brand assets and first-review release automation
selected_plan.summary: Generate and apply the app icon, update launch screen branding, port ASC automation and metadata scaffolding, then build/archive and retry env discovery.

retained_alternatives.title: Code-native simple symbol icon
retained_alternatives.summary: Use deterministic vector-like drawing if generated art is rejected later.
cons: Less polished for App Store presentation

retained_alternatives.title: Delay automation until ASC record exists
retained_alternatives.summary: Keep automation blocked until App Store Connect ids are manually created.

nodes.title: Prepare WhatIfInvest for first-review readiness
nodes.description: Add app branding, launch-screen integration, release automation scaffolding, and archive/readiness verification.
nodes.why: The app needs a finished icon, non-placeholder launch screen, and repeatable ASC path before first review.
acceptance_criteria: App icon assets are populated
Launch screen uses the new mark
ASC automation scaffold exists
Build/archive and ASC discovery are attempted
constraints: No official stock or ETF logos
assumptions: The bundle id and team id are intended for first-review setup
ASC ids may not yet exist
risks: Generated icon quality at small sizes
alternatives: Delay automation until ASC record exists

nodes.title: Generate and apply AppIcon resources
nodes.description: Generate a polished What If Invest app icon and derive all required AppIcon PNGs and Contents.json entries.
nodes.why: The app currently has an empty AppIcon set and cannot present a finished brand identity.
acceptance_criteria: A 1024x1024 source icon is saved in the workspace
AppIcon.appiconset contains required derived PNG sizes
Contents.json references the generated icon files
Icon assets have no alpha channel problems for App Store use
assumptions: Generated bitmap art is acceptable as the source asset
done_criteria: A 1024x1024 source icon is saved in the workspace
AppIcon.appiconset contains required derived PNG sizes
Contents.json references the generated icon files
Icon assets have no alpha channel problems for App Store use

verification.description: Inspect generated 1024px and small derived icons.
Build WhatIfInvest with the populated app icon set.

nodes.title: Apply the icon mark to LaunchScreen
nodes.description: Create a launch-screen image asset from the icon and update the storyboard to use it instead of the placeholder square.
nodes.why: Launch should match the App Store icon and avoid placeholder UI.
acceptance_criteria: A launch icon image set exists in Assets.xcassets
LaunchScreen.storyboard references the launch image asset
Existing launch title and localized subtitle remain intact
Storyboard remains valid XML
assumptions: The launch screen can reference an xcassets image set
risks: Storyboard XML edit could be malformed
done_criteria: A launch icon image set exists in Assets.xcassets
LaunchScreen.storyboard references the launch image asset
Existing launch title and localized subtitle remain intact

verification.description: Build or launch the app after storyboard edits.

nodes.title: Port ASC automation and metadata scaffold
nodes.description: Add scripts, env template, metadata strings, site-content drafts, and README guidance adapted from Hi_Tomorrow for WhatIfInvest.
nodes.why: First-review preparation needs a repeatable path for metadata, screenshots, readiness check, and later submission.
acceptance_criteria: .asc/env.example exists with empty ids and relevant defaults
ASC helper scripts exist under scripts/
App Store localization drafts exist for en-US and ko-KR
README documents first-review setup and archive/readiness flow
Scripts avoid committing credentials
constraints: Adapt Hi_Tomorrow scripts rather than inventing unrelated tooling
assumptions: asc 0.1.66 remains the local CLI baseline
risks: Screenshot pipeline may need future raw screenshot generation
alternatives: Delay automation until ASC record exists
done_criteria: .asc/env.example exists with empty ids and relevant defaults
ASC helper scripts exist under scripts/
App Store localization drafts exist for en-US and ko-KR
README documents first-review setup and archive/readiness flow

verification.description: Run syntax checks for added shell scripts.
Compare script behavior with Hi_Tomorrow source scripts.

nodes.title: Build, archive, and retry ASC env discovery
nodes.description: Run build/test/archive checks and use ASC listing to fill local env ids where possible.
nodes.why: Review readiness is only useful if the archive path and ASC setup gaps are known.
acceptance_criteria: Simulator build result is recorded
Unit test result is recorded when runnable
Archive result path or exact failure is recorded
ASC app/version id discovery is attempted
.asc/env is filled only with discoverable non-secret ids or left with explicit blanks
constraints: Do not submit for review automatically
assumptions: Local Xcode and asc authentication are configured or will return actionable errors
risks: Signing or ASC record setup may block completion
alternatives: Skip archive until App Store Connect setup is complete
done_criteria: Unit test result is recorded when runnable
Archive result path or exact failure is recorded
ASC app/version id discovery is attempted
.asc/env is filled only with discoverable non-secret ids or left with explicit blanks

verification.description: xcodebuild build or test for simulator.
xcodebuild archive for generic iOS destination.
Run ASC listing/readiness commands when authenticated.

risk_summary.description: Archive may fail due to signing or App Store Connect setup.
risk_summary.mitigation: Run archive and report exact signing or provisioning blocker.

risk_summary.description: First-review ids may not exist yet.
risk_summary.mitigation: Scaffold env and fill discovered ids only.
